info.title: OpenAIP - Core API
info.description:
The Core API provides endpoints to handle and consume a variety of aeronautical content.

Authentication

To utilize the OpenAIP public API, you'll need a unique API key. Here's how to obtain and use your client API key:

  1. Ensure you are logged into your OpenAIP account
  2. Navigate to the user profile's API Clients page
  3. On the API Clients page, request a new API client. Each client comes with its own unique API key
  4. When making requests to the OpenAIP public API, include your API key using one of the following methods:

    • HTTP Header: Use the HTTP header x-openaip-api-key to include the API key in each request to the API.
    • Query Parameter: Use the query parameter apiKey to include the API key in each request to the API.

Keep your API keys confidential at all times! Treat them like passwords as they grant access to OpenAIP resources on your behalf. The API Clients page allows you to view or revoke your API keys at any time. If you encounter any issues or have questions, please contact our support team for assistance.

If you want to provide more sophisticated authentication mechanisms with OpenAIP inside your application, for example OIDC/OAuth2, please contact us directly for more information.

Rate Limiting

The OpenAIP API enforces rate limits on several endpoints. Please consider caching responses on your side to not hit the rate limit.

Attribution

Please add a proper attribution link to OpenAIP (https://www.openaip.net) as data source within your application!

tags.name: Airport Reporting Points
tags.description: CRUD endpoints for airport reporting points.

tags.name: Hang Gliding Sites
tags.description: CRUD endpoints for hang gliding sites.

tags.name: Obstacles
tags.description: CRUD endpoints for obstacles. Obstacles are automatically updated by openaip. Obstacles are NOT derived from AIP data and are incomplete and sometimes lack height information. Use with care!

tags.name: RC Airfields
tags.description: CRUD endpoints for RC airfields. Some RC airfields are automatically updated by openaip. RC airfields are NOT derived from AIP data and are incomplete and sometimes lack information. Use with care!

tags.name: RFC
tags.description: Endpoints to query RFCs (Request For Change). Please note that RFC documents have a limited lifetime and are removed after a certain time to reduce the database size. The current TTL is set to 90 days.

bearerAuth.description: Send a valid base64 encoded OIDC access token (JWT) in the 'Authorization' header. The token must be prefixed with 'Bearer'.

apiKeyHeader.name: x-openaip-api-key
apiKeyHeader.description: A valid third party application's ID token sent with the 'x-openaip-api-key' header. Tokens are granted to trusted third party applications and can be created in the user's profile page in the web application.

apiKey.name: apiKey
apiKey.description: A valid third party application's API key sent with the query parameter 'apiKey'. This can be used instead of sending it within the header 'x-openaip-api-key'. Tokens are granted to trusted third party applications and can be created in the user's profile page in the web application.

rfcSourceId.name: sourceId
rfcSourceId.description: Returns all RFCs for the specified document ID, i.e. the document's 'change history'.

updatedAfter.name: updatedAfter
updatedAfter.description: An URI encoded ISO 3601 UTC timestring.

rfcContentType.name: contentType
rfcContentType.description: Returns all RFCs related to the specified content type, i.e. 'all RFCs for airports'.

bbox.name: bbox
bbox.description: A comma separated list of lat/lon values that define a bound box of an area of interest (AOI). The bbox must be defined as 'minx,miny,maxx,maxy'.

get.description: Endpoint to load all JSON schemas that are used within this service, e.g. "path/name-schema.json".

parameters.name: schemaUri
parameters.description: The requested JSON schema URI.

200.description: The requested JSON schema.

504.description: Bad gateway or request timed out. Usually this indicates that the service is temporarily not available.

get.description: Check service health. This endpoint does not require authentication.

200.description: 200 status code is returned if API is in a healthy state.

504.description: Bad gateway or request timed out. Usually this indicates that the service is temporarily not available.

get.description: Endpoint to retrieve a list of airports.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Defines which page to return. Used with query parameter 'limit' to paginate through large result lists. Page numbers start at 1. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Defines maximum item count retrieved per page. Default value depends on the called API service, usually defaults to 1000.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma separated list of field names that should be available on returned objects in the list. If not specified, all available object fields will be returned.

parameters.name: pos
parameters.description: A position defined by decimal coordinates. If set, endpoint will only return documents that are within a specific radius around the requested coordinates. Radius can be defined by using the query parameter 'dist'. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value for the radius.

parameters.name: dist
parameters.description: Distance in meters around specified position if defined. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort query results by specified field. If set, the query parameter 'sortDesc' can be used to change sort direction. If 'sortDesc' is not set, default sort is ascending order.

parameters.name: sortDesc
parameters.description: Sort query results in ascending order. Only applies if 'sortBy' is set. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Search by ISO alpha-2 country code.

parameters.name: searchOptLwc
parameters.description: If true, uses leading wildcard regex to search results. This can be used to find something that 'contains' the input string. Defaults to false and uses leading wildcard search.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A document reference ID.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description:
Searches and returns airports where searchable fields match the input string.Search is case-insensitive. Searchable fields are:
  • name
  • icaoCode
  • iataCode
  • altIdentifier

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Show only airports of the provided types. Possible values: 

 0: Airport (civil/military)

1: Glider Site

2: Airfield Civil

3: International Airport

4: Heliport Military

5: Military Aerodrome

6: Ultra Light Flying Site

7: Heliport Civil

8: Aerodrome Closed

9: Airport resp. Airfield IFR

10: Airfield Water

11: Landing Strip

12: Agricultural Landing Strip

13: Altiport

parameters.name: trafficType
parameters.description:
Show only airports that allow the provided traffic types. Possible values: 

 0: VFR 

1: IFR

parameters.name: ppr
parameters.description: If true shows only airfields that are PPR.

parameters.name: private
parameters.description: If true shows only airfields that are private.

parameters.name: skydiveActivity
parameters.description: If true shows only airfields that are have skydive activity.

parameters.name: winchOnly
parameters.description: If true shows only airfields that allow winch launch only.

parameters.name: servicesFuelType
parameters.description:
Only show airports that provide at least one of the provided fuel types. Possible values: 

 0: Super PLUS

1: AVGAS

2: Jet A

3: Jet A1

4: Jet B

5: Diesel

6: AVGAS UL91

parameters.name: servicesGliderTowing
parameters.description:
Only show airports that provide at least one of the provided glider towing types Possible values: 

 0: Self Launch

1: Winch

2: Tow

3: Auto Tow

4: Bungee

5: Gravity Powered

parameters.name: servicesHandlingFacility
parameters.description:
Only show airports that provide at least one of the provided handling facilities. Possible values: 

 0: Cargo Handling

1: De-Icing

2: Maintenance

3: Security

4: Shelter

parameters.name: servicesPassengerFacility
parameters.description:
Only show airports that provide at least one of the provided passenger facilities. Possible values: 

 0: Bank Office

1: Post Office

2: Customs

3: Lodging

4: Medical Facility

5: Restaurant

6: Sanitation

7: Transportation

8: Laundry Service

9: Camping

200.description: The list of airports is returned.

401.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid.

403.description: Authentication was successful but client has insufficient permissions to access the resource.

504.description: Bad gateway or request timed out. Usually this indicates that the service is temporarily not available.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Defines which page to return. Used with query parameter 'limit' to paginate through large result lists. Page numbers start at 1. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Defines maximum item count retrieved per page. Default value depends on the called API service, usually defaults to 1000.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma separated list of field names that should be available on returned objects in the list. If not specified, all available object fields will be returned.

parameters.name: pos
parameters.description: A position defined by decimal coordinates. If set, endpoint will only return documents that are within a specific radius around the requested coordinates. Radius can be defined by using the query parameter 'dist'. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value for the radius.

parameters.name: dist
parameters.description: Distance in meters around specified position if defined. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort query results by specified field. If set, the query parameter 'sortDesc' can be used to change sort direction. If 'sortDesc' is not set, default sort is ascending order.

parameters.name: sortDesc
parameters.description: Sort query results in ascending order. Only applies if 'sortBy' is set. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Search by ISO alpha-2 country code.

parameters.name: searchOptLwc
parameters.description: If true, uses leading wildcard regex to search results. This can be used to find something that 'contains' the input string. Defaults to false and uses leading wildcard search.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A document reference ID.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description:
Searches and returns airspaces where searchable fields match the input string.Search is case-insensitive. Searchable fields are:
  • name
  • identifier

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Show only airspaces of the provided types. Possible values: 

 0: Other

1: Restricted

2: Danger

3: Prohibited

4: Controlled Tower Region (CTR)

5: Transponder Mandatory Zone (TMZ)

6: Radio Mandatory Zone (RMZ)

7: Terminal Maneuvering Area (TMA)

8: Temporary Reserved Area (TRA)

9: Temporary Segregated Area (TSA)

10: Flight Information Region (FIR)

11: Upper Flight Information Region (UIR)

12: Air Defense Identification Zone (ADIZ)

13: Airport Traffic Zone (ATZ)

14: Military Airport Traffic Zone (MATZ)

15: Airway

16: Military Training Route (MTR)

17: Alert Area

18: Warning Area

19: Protected Area

20: Helicopter Traffic Zone (HTZ)

21: Gliding Sector

22: Transponder Setting (TRP)

23: Traffic Information Zone (TIZ)

24: Traffic Information Area (TIA)

25: Military Training Area (MTA)

26: Control Area (CTA)

27: ACC Sector (ACC)

28: Aerial Sporting Or Recreational Activity

29: Low Altitude Overflight Restriction

30: Military Route (MRT)

31: TSA/TRA Feeding Route (TFR)

32: VFR Sector

33: FIS Sector

34: Lower Traffic Area (LTA)

35: Upper Traffic Area (UTA)

36: Military Controlled Tower Region (MCTR)

parameters.name: icaoClass
parameters.description:
Show only airspaces of the provided ICAO classes. Possible values: 

 0: A

1: B

2: C

3: D

4: E

5: F

6: G

8: Unclassified / Special Use Airspace (SUA)

parameters.name: activity
parameters.description:
Show only airspaces that are exclusively reserved for the specified activities. Possible values: 

 0: None - No specific activity (default)

1: Parachuting Activity

2: Aerobatics Activity

3: Aeroclub And Arial Work Area

4: Ultra Light Machine (ULM) Activity

5: Hang Gliding/Paragliding

parameters.name: onDemand
parameters.description: If true only shows airspaces that are actived on demand.

parameters.name: onRequest
parameters.description: If true only shows airspaces that are actived on request.

parameters.name: byNotam
parameters.description: If true only shows airspaces that are actived by NOTAM.

parameters.name: specialAgreement
parameters.description: If true only shows airspaces that regulated by a special agreement.

parameters.name: requestCompliance
parameters.description: If true only shows "unofficial" airspaces that are most often defined by national authorities and that demand that pilots of all types of aircrafts are requested to comply with those defined unofficial airspaces and act accordingly, e.g. airspaces for national parks or monuments in the US.

200.description: The list of airspaces is returned.

401.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid.

403.description: Authentication was successful but client has insufficient permissions to access the resource.

504.description: Bad gateway or request timed out. Usually this indicates that the service is temporarily not available.

get.description: Endpoint to retrieve a list of hang gliding sites.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Defines which page to return. Used with query parameter 'limit' to paginate through large result lists. Page numbers start at 1. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Defines maximum item count retrieved per page. Default value depends on the called API service, usually defaults to 1000.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma separated list of field names that should be available on returned objects in the list. If not specified, all available object fields will be returned.

parameters.name: pos
parameters.description: A position defined by decimal coordinates. If set, endpoint will only return documents that are within a specific radius around the requested coordinates. Radius can be defined by using the query parameter 'dist'. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value for the radius.

parameters.name: dist
parameters.description: Distance in meters around specified position if defined. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort query results by specified field. If set, the query parameter 'sortDesc' can be used to change sort direction. If 'sortDesc' is not set, default sort is ascending order.

parameters.name: sortDesc
parameters.description: Sort query results in ascending order. Only applies if 'sortBy' is set. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Search by ISO alpha-2 country code.

parameters.name: searchOptLwc
parameters.description: If true, uses leading wildcard regex to search results. This can be used to find something that 'contains' the input string. Defaults to false and uses leading wildcard search.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A document reference ID.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description:
Searches and returns navaids where searchable fields match the input string.Search is case-insensitive. Searchable fields are:
  • name
  • identifier

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Show only hang gliding sites of the provided types. Possible values: 

 0: Take-Off

1: Landing

parameters.name: category
parameters.description:
Show only hang gliding sites that are suitable for the selected categories. Possible values: 

 0: Paraglider

1: Fixed Wing

parameters.name: access
parameters.description:
Show only hang gliding sites that provide the selected type of access. Possible values: 

 0: Hike

1: Cable Car

2: Chair Lift

3: Car

4: Shuttle/Bus

parameters.name: certified
parameters.description: Show only hang gliding sites that are certified.

parameters.name: suitableWindDirection
parameters.description:
Show only hang gliding sites that are suitable for the specified wind directions. Possible values: 

 0: N

1: NE

2: E

3: SE

4: S

5: SW

6: W

7: NW

200.description: The list of hang gliding sites is returned.

401.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid.

403.description: Authentication was successful but client has insufficient permissions to access the resource.

504.description: Bad gateway or request timed out. Usually this indicates that the service is temporarily not available.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Defines maximum item count retrieved per page. Default value depends on the called API service, usually defaults to 1000.

parameters.name: fields

parameters.name: pos

Radius can be defined by using the query parameter 'dist'. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value for the radius.

parameters.name: dist
parameters.description: Distance in meters around specified position if defined. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort query results by specified field. If set, the query parameter 'sortDesc' can be used to change sort direction. If 'sortDesc' is not set, default sort is ascending order.

parameters.name: sortDesc
parameters.description: Sort query results in ascending order. Only applies if 'sortBy' is set. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Search by ISO alpha-2 country code.

parameters.name: searchOptLwc
parameters.description: If true, uses leading wildcard regex to search results. This can be used to find something that 'contains' the input string. Defaults to false and uses leading wildcard search.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A document reference ID.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description:
Searches and returns hotspots where searchable fields match the input string.Search is case-insensitive. Searchable fields are:
  • name
  • identifier

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Show only hotspots of the provided types. Possible values: 

 0: natural

1: artificial

parameters.name: reliability
parameters.description:
Show only hotspots of the provided reliability. Possible values: 

 0: poor

1: fair

2: high

3: very high

parameters.name: occurrence
parameters.description:
Show only hotspots of the provided occurrence. Possible values: 

 0: irregular intervals

1: scheduled interval

2: nearly constant

parameters.name: category
parameters.description:
Show only hotspots that are suited for the specified aircraft categories. Possible values: 

 0: Glider

1: Hang Glider

2: Paraglider

parameters.name: timeOfDay
parameters.description:
Show only hotspots that work at the provided times of day. Possible values: 

 0: early morning

1: morning

2: noon

3: afternoon

4: evening

parameters.name: favTimeOfDay
parameters.description:
Show only hotspots that work best at the provided times of day. Possible values: 

 0: early morning

1: morning

2: noon

3: afternoon

4: evening

parameters.name: favWindDirection
parameters.description:
Show only hotspots that work best at the provided wind directions. Possible values: 

 0: N

1: NE

2: E

3: SE

4: S

5: SW

6: W

7: NW

parameters.name: reqWindDirection
parameters.description:
Show only hotspots that required the provided wind directions to work. Possible values: 

 0: N

1: NE

2: E

3: SE

4: S

5: SW

6: W

7: NW

200.description: The list of hotspots is returned.

401.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid.

403.description: Authentication was successful but client has insufficient permissions to access the resource.

get.description: Endpoint to retrieve a list of obstacles.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Defines which page to return. Used with query parameter 'limit' to paginate through large result lists. Page numbers start at 1. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Defines maximum item count retrieved per page. Default value depends on the called API service, usually defaults to 1000.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma separated list of field names that should be available on returned objects in the list. If not specified, all available object fields will be returned.

parameters.name: pos
parameters.description: A position defined by decimal coordinates. If set, endpoint will only return documents that are within a specific radius around the requested coordinates. Radius can be defined by using the query parameter 'dist'. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value for the radius.

parameters.name: dist
parameters.description: Distance in meters around specified position if defined. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort query results by specified field. If set, the query parameter 'sortDesc' can be used to change sort direction. If 'sortDesc' is not set, default sort is ascending order.

parameters.name: sortDesc
parameters.description: Sort query results in ascending order. Only applies if 'sortBy' is set. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Search by ISO alpha-2 country code.

parameters.name: searchOptLwc
parameters.description: If true, uses leading wildcard regex to search results. This can be used to find something that 'contains' the input string. Defaults to false and uses leading wildcard search.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A document reference ID.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description:
Searches and returns hotspots where searchable fields match the input string.Search is case-insensitive. Searchable fields are:
  • name
  • identifier

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Show only obstacles of the provided types. Possible values: 

 0: natural

1: artificial

200.description: The list of obstacles is returned.

401.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid.

403.description: Authentication was successful but client has insufficient permissions to access the resource.

get.summary: Returns a list of RC airfields.
get.description: Endpoint to retrieve a list of RC airfields.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Defines which page to return. Used with query parameter 'limit' to paginate through large result lists. Page numbers start at 1. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Defines maximum item count retrieved per page. Default value depends on the called API service, usually defaults to 1000.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma separated list of field names that should be available on returned objects in the list. If not specified, all available object fields will be returned.

parameters.name: pos
parameters.description: A position defined by decimal coordinates. If set, endpoint will only return documents that are within a specific radius around the requested coordinates. Radius can be defined by using the query parameter 'dist'. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value for the radius.

parameters.name: dist
parameters.description: Distance in meters around specified position if defined. If not set, endpoints will usually set a default value.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort query results by specified field. If set, the query parameter 'sortDesc' can be used to change sort direction. If 'sortDesc' is not set, default sort is ascending order.

parameters.name: sortDesc
parameters.description: Sort query results in ascending order. Only applies if 'sortBy' is set. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Search by ISO alpha-2 country code.

parameters.name: searchOptLwc
parameters.description: If true, uses leading wildcard regex to search results. This can be used to find something that 'contains' the input string. Defaults to false and uses leading wildcard search.

parameters.name: combustion
parameters.description: If true shows only RC airfields that allow combustion powered models.

parameters.description: If true shows only RC airfields that allow electric powered models.

parameters.name: turbine
parameters.description: If true shows only RC airfields that allow turbine powered models.

parameters.description: A document reference ID.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description:
Searches and returns hotspots where searchable fields match the input string.Search is case-insensitive. Searchable fields are:
